title: Rename app to Dard-e-munasif and apply custom logo across branding

requirements.text: Update the app name from 'Spiritual Hub' to 'Dard-e-munasif' everywhere it appears in the frontend — including the navbar/header title text, browser tab title (index.html <title>), and any other visible branding locations.

quotes: Change name spritual hub to Dard-e-munasif with this logo
update the app name to Dard-e-munasif

acceptanceCriteria: The navbar/header displays 'Dard-e-munasif' as the app name
No instance of 'Spiritual Hub' remains visible in the UI

requirements.text: Replace the current logo/icon in the navbar, header, and favicon with the uploaded circular black & white logo image (dard-e-munasif-logo.dim_200x200.png) saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/. Display it as a circular image next to the app name in the header and set it as the browser favicon.

quotes: Change name spritual hub to Dard-e-munasif with this logo
replace the branding with the uploaded logo (the black & white circular image with the blindfolded figure)

acceptanceCriteria: The circular black & white logo appears in the navbar/header next to the app name
The favicon in the browser tab uses the same logo image
The logo renders correctly on both mobile and desktop viewports
The logo image is served from frontend/public/assets/generated/

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not change the backend schema or any backend logic
PIN authentication (09186114) and all existing functionality must remain intact
nonGoals: Changing the visual theme, color palette, or layout
Adding new features or modifying existing content management
Modifying backend data models or CRUD operations

edits: Crop and optimize the uploaded black & white circular photo of a blindfolded man with 'dard-e-munasif' written on the blindfold into a clean circular logo with transparent or white background (FB_IMG_1771696316080.jpg > dard-e-munasif-logo.dim_200x200.png)
